characters.name: 江岚
characters.description: 2D国漫少女角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，年轻女性，黑色中长发带整齐刘海，圆润清秀但不幼态的脸，浅灰蓝长袖连衣裙，深色腰带，清楚可见的领口、袖口和裙摆层次，平底深色鞋，身形纤细，气质安静克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景，完整穿衣，不能像灰模或人体模板。

characters.name: 沈砚
characters.description: 2D国漫青年男性角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，黑色短发，清秀偏瘦的脸，深色长外套或长袍内搭浅色上衣，长裤和深色鞋靴，身形修长，气质沉稳克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景。

shots.title: 河边远景建立
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, two full body characters, Jiang Lan standing on the left stone path in the left side of the frame, Shen Yan standing on the right stone path in the right side of the frame, both characters fully visible from head to toe, both feet touching the ground, both characters inside the riverside environment, interacting with the riverside path and open air environment, wide establishing shot, dusk riverside, old stone bridge in the mid background, willow trees on the left, open river on the right, natural body scale, correct perspective, grounded shadows, unified dusk lighting, guoman cinematic style, clean composition, no border
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, scenery only, no character, no people, missing character, one character only, cropped body, cut off feet, floating character, hovering feet, pasted character, collage, character sheet, duplicate person, tiny distant person, detached shadow, wrong perspective, indoor scene, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: slow push in, subtle river ripples, willow leaves sway lightly, both characters hold a stable standing pose with readable silhouettes
shots.notes: 建立镜头必须先把两人明确放进同一河边空间。人物不是贴图，脚要接地，桥和河岸关系稳定，画面不能出现白边。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 双人中景起话
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, two full body characters, Jiang Lan standing on the left side of the frame on the stone path, Shen Yan standing on the right side of the frame on the same stone path, both characters fully visible from head to toe, both feet touching the ground, Jiang Lan turning slightly toward Shen Yan, Shen Yan looking at Jiang Lan, both characters interacting with each other inside the riverside environment, medium two shot, bridge visible in the center background, river on the right, dusk outdoor lighting, natural shadows, correct body scale, correct perspective, integrated characters, no pasted cutout, no border
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, no character, missing one character, wrong character count, portrait crop, close-up face only, cropped feet, floating body, detached shadow, pasted character, collage, character sheet, duplicate limbs, deformed anatomy, indoor lighting, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Jiang Lan gives a small head turn and subtle hand gesture while speaking, Shen Yan remains grounded and mostly still, camera stays stable
shots.notes: 双人对话中景。动作要清楚，但仍以稳定站位为主。两人必须完整处于河边空间中，不能只剩半身。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 江岚近景说话
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, two full body characters, Jiang Lan standing on the stone path at center-left, full body character fully visible from head to toe, both feet touching the ground, Jiang Lan turning three quarters and speaking with one clear hand gesture, Shen Yan standing on the right side of the frame as a smaller secondary full body character, Shen Yan also fully visible and grounded on the path, both characters inside the same riverside environment, interacting with the environment, medium shot with environment continuity, bridge orientation unchanged, river on the right, dusk side light, natural shadows, correct perspective, not an isolated portrait, no border
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, no character, missing secondary character, portrait only, upper body only, cropped legs, cropped feet, floating character, pasted character, fashion photo, character sheet, duplicate person, changed outfit, indoor background, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Jiang Lan moves her shoulders slightly and speaks with a controlled hand gesture, Shen Yan gives a small background reaction, water movement stays subtle
shots.dialogue: 江岚：先沿着河岸往前走。
shots.notes: 江岚是主体，但沈砚仍必须在场。不能把镜头退化成单人摆拍肖像，人物和环境要继续融合。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 沈砚回应点头
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, two full body characters, Shen Yan standing on the riverside stone path at center-right, full body character fully visible from head to toe, both feet touching the ground, Shen Yan giving a gentle nod, Jiang Lan standing on the left edge as a readable secondary full body character, Jiang Lan also fully visible and grounded on the same path, both characters inside the same riverside environment, interacting with the environment, reverse medium shot, same bridge orientation, same river placement, same willow trees, same dusk lighting, natural perspective, integrated lighting, no pasted collage, no border

shots.video_prompt: Shen Yan nods gently and gives a brief reply while keeping his stance grounded, Jiang Lan remains visible on the left, camera stays steady
shots.dialogue: 沈砚：好，桥那边看得更清楚。
shots.notes: 反打镜头。主体切换到沈砚，但仍然必须维持双人空间关系和稳定接地。
